summary: Project involves a website or app with a WhatsApp integration and artwork-related content. User requested changing a WhatsApp message text from a placeholder greeting to a proper artwork inquiry message.
architectural_notes: Project includes WhatsApp integration for customer/artwork inquiries

existing_features.title: Replace all occurrences of the WhatsApp pre-filled message text 'Hello Mudit Sharma' (used in WhatsApp href/link parameters across Navigation, HeroSection, ContactSection, and Footer components) with a proper artwork inquiry message such as: 'Hello, I came across your artwork portfolio and I'm interested in discussing a potential project. Could you please share more details about your services and availability?'

new_feature_requests.summary: Change WhatsApp text from 'Hello Mudit Sharma' to a proper artwork inquiry message
